offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent supplier delivery performance causes late orders. We provide monthly scorecards instead of manual tracking of supplier performance metrics.
problem: Inconsistent supplier delivery performance leading to late orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Engage in community groups for Amazon sellers
try_it: Let users try Monthly performance scorecards on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
